name: Crock Pot Sauerbraten
recipeIngredient: 5 1/2 pounds Pot roast or rump roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In the removable liner of the crockpot, combine water, vinegar, sliced onions, sliced lemon, sugar, crushed beef bouillon cubes, ginger, cloves, bay leaves, and peppercorns.
2. Add the meat. Cover and refrigerate for 36 to 72 hours, turning the meat occasionally.
3. The longer the meat marinates, the spicier it will become.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade; strain the marinade through a fine mesh strainer, reserving one cup.
5. Place the chopped vegetables (onion, carrot, and celery) at the bottom of the removable liner, then place the meat on top of the vegetables.
6. Pour the reserved cup of marinade over everything in the crockpot.
7. Place the removable liner in the base of the crockpot. Cover and cook on AUTO for 7-8 hours, or LOW for 9-11 hours, or HIGH for 5 hours.
8. Remove the meat to a carving board and let it sit for 15 to 20 minutes so it can firm up before carving.
9. Add the gingersnap crumbs to the liquid in the crockpot and cook on HIGH for an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
10. Slice the meat and serve with the sauce spooned over the top.
